data.title: PAR Technology Corporation (NYSE: PAR) to report Q4 2025 financial results on Feb 26, 2026, 4:00 p.m. ET with investor call at 4:30 p.m. ET. Webcast available.
data.description: PAR Technology Corporation (NYSE: PAR) from New Hartford, N.Y. revealed that it is set to disclose its fourth-quarter financial results on February 26, 2026, at 4:00 p.m. ET. Following this, an investor presentation and conference call will take place at 4:30 p.m. ET. The live webcast of the earnings conference call can be accessed through the PAR Technology Investor Relations website at http://www.partech.com/investor-relations/.

data.title: Correction: Sony Electronics launches WF-1000XM6 truly wireless earbuds for premium sound quality and noise-canceling.
data.description: Sony Electronics has recently unveiled the WF-1000XM6 Truly Wireless Earbuds, boasting top-tier noise-canceling technology and premium sound quality. The announcement was made on February 12, 2026. The new earbuds are setting new standards in the market with their exceptional noise-canceling capabilities. These earbuds are equipped with state-of-the-art features to ensure unparalleled sound performance, offering users an immersive listening experience.

data.title: 23rd Unforgettable Awards to honor Asian and Pacific Islander excellence with Chloé Zhao, Bowen Yang, Daniel Dae Kim, and more on March 13. Presented by GoldenTV and Character Media. Los Angeles, Feb. 12, 2026.
data.description: Chloé Zhao, Bowen Yang, Daniel Dae Kim, Park Chan-wook, and the K-pop Demon Hunters are among the notable personalities set to receive honors at the upcoming 23rd Annual Ceremony. The event will be presented by GoldenTV and Character Media and will be broadcast as a special on GoldenTV on March 13, 2026. Scheduled to take place in Los Angeles, this event is expected to attract a wide audience and celebrate the achievements of these individuals in their respective fields.

data.title: Preliminary ratings assigned to BX 2026-XL6 CMBS securitization with $1.2 billion loan on 61 assets.
data.description: In New York, KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to seven classes of BX 2026-XL6, a CMBS single-borrower securitization. The transaction involves a $1.2 billion floating rate interest-only mortgage loan. The loan, anticipated to have a two-year initial term with three potential one-year extensions, will mandate monthly interest-only payments. Security for the loan will be the borrower’s fee simple interests in a total of 56 industrial assets and five office assets.

data.title: Ademi LLP is probing securities fraud claims against ICON plc (NASDAQ: ICLR) for potential inaccuracies in financial statements.
data.description: A law firm in Milwaukee, Ademi LLP, has initiated an investigation into potential securities fraud allegations against ICON (NASDAQ: ICLR) as of February 12, 2026. The investigation stems from allegations that ICON possibly provided misleading information concerning its financial statements, business operations, and future outlook. Anyone interested in more details can access further information by clicking on the provided link.

data.title: Rocket Alumni Solutions partners with Junipero Serra High School to install custom interactive digital display preserving alumni achievements.
data.description: In February 12, 2026, Rocket Alumni Solutions, a prominent technology provider in Boston, announced their collaboration with Junipero Serra High School in San Mateo, California. The partnership involves the installation of a specialized digital display aimed at showcasing alumni accomplishments and fostering community engagement. This initiative seeks to highlight the achievements of former students while creating a more interactive platform for the school community.

data.title: Albertsons Companies joins OpenAI Ad Pilot Program to enhance AI strategy in advertising.
data.description: The latest advancement in AI strategy has been revealed by Albertsons Companies from Boise, Idaho, as they declare their participation in the OpenAI Ad Pilot Program.

data.title: Humann and Texas Athletics partner to promote heart health with in-game experiences in Austin. AUSTIN, Texas, Feb. 12, 2026.
data.description: In Austin, a locally-based cardiovascular supplement brand has joined forces with UT Athletics to promote heart health, blood flow, and overall performance. The partnership, launched on February 12, 2026, aims to merge sports and wellness during American Heart Health Month. This collaboration between Humann and Texas Athletics showcases the importance of cardiovascular support in enhancing on-court performance and overall well-being.

data.title: Tech stocks, including Apple and Nvidia, lost $500 billion in market value on Thursday, with Apple alone recording a loss of $200.04 billion.
data.description: Thursday's market downturn on Wall Street saw a significant tech sell-off, resulting in a total market value loss exceeding $500 billion across 10 major companies. Unlike previous declines primarily affecting software stocks, this decrease also impacted traditional hardware giants. The largest single-day market cap losses within the tech sector on Thursday reported by Coinmarketcap.com were as follows: Apple Inc. experienced a $200.04 billion drop, Tesla Inc. lost $52.28 billion, Amazon.com Inc. saw a decrease of $51.08 billion, Broadcom Inc. faced a decline of $41.77 billion, Cisco Systems Inc. lost $39.42 billion, Meta Platforms Inc. experienced a $35.19 billion decrease, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. reported a loss of $30.85 billion, AppLovin Corp. saw a decrease of $28.05 billion, NVIDIA Corp. faced a $20.82 billion drop, and Palantir Technologies Inc. lost $19.54 billion. This information can be further explored on Benzinga.com.

data.title: ETHZilla, a firm with publicly traded Ethereum treasury, shifts to tokenizing jet engine leases as ETH declines.
data.description: ETHZilla, a publicly traded Ethereum treasury company, is converting ownership of jet engines into tokens that represent equity. These engines are being leased to a significant air carrier. This move allows investors to participate in the ownership of these engines through the tokenization process.

data.title: Recent Trump admin decisions disrupt US aviation, creating confusion amidst already strained system.
data.description: Recent unexpected decisions made by the Trump administration have led to confusion within the already overwhelmed U.S. aviation sector.

data.title: Hyper, a digital infrastructure partner, appoints Wendi Runyon as Chief Strategy Officer in Richmond.
data.description: In the city of Richmond, Virginia, on February 12, 2026, Hyper, a digital infrastructure partner located in the United States, announced the appointment of Wendi Runyon as their Chief Strategy Officer. This move is aimed at reshaping the approach to designing, constructing, distributing, and supporting mission-critical solutions. Wendi will now be part of the executive leadership team to provide strategic direction for the company.
